description_long: This is a single-story brick house with a flat roof and a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a well-maintained lawn and several mature trees and shrubs. The front facade features a central entryway with a paved walkway leading up to it, flanked by flower beds and low hedges. Large, multi-pane windows are symmetrically arranged on the front and side walls, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The house has a simple, functional design with minimal ornamentation, typical of mid-20th-century suburban architecture. The roof is flat and edged with a low parapet, and the exterior walls are finished in red brick. The landscaping includes a mix of deciduous and evergreen trees, providing shade and privacy to the property.
description: A single-story, flat-roofed brick house with large windows, a central entryway, and landscaped surroundings featuring trees and flower beds.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, paved walkway, flower beds, and symmetrical windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the brick wall, side windows, and dense tree coverage on the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back windows, flat roof, and additional landscaping with trees and shrubs.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the side and rear, with visible windows, greenery, and the paved path leading to the entry.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with a single door, paved walkway, and flanking flower beds; no porch or overhang.
